backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: removal of Date/Weather/Temperature fields and removal of Punch In/Out fields from the ReportForm component, with associated file and test references.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Minimal Tailwind base CSS file defining light and dark OKLCH color tokens for shadcn-style design system variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading Inter and Oswald fonts from Google Fonts and jsPDF 2.5.1 via CDN for client-side PDF generation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component rendering a sticky industrial-themed header, hero banner with feature icons, the ReportForm, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Daily field report form managing project info, personnel names, punch times, work details, status, notes, and signature with localStorage persistence and PDF export; Date/Weather/Temperature and Lead/Assistant punch time fields have been removed.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module confirming no backend queries are needed since the app is fully client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles defining a dark industrial OKLCH color system with safety yellow/orange accents, dark gray button component classes, and dark color-scheme for date/time inputs.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point wrapping the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Defines a `ReportData` interface and `generatePDF` function that uses jsPDF (loaded via CDN) to produce a formatted letter-sized PDF daily field report with sections for punch times, project info, personnel, work details, and signatures.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with CSS-variable-based colors, custom fonts (Inter, Oswald, JetBrains Mono), border radii, glow box shadows, and keyframe animations, plus the animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Field Report Pro project, recording two completed features: removing Date/Weather/Temperature fields from Project Information and removing per-technician Punch In/Out fields from the Punch section of the ReportForm component.
